{{Infobox character
| name = Zyrana
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Zyrana]] is a second-generation [[Perfected]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Zyrana]] is a [[Perfected]] combatant.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Zyrana]] can activate a [[Subspace Rupture]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
